basic_details.job_title: HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 91 Posts
basic_details.short_information: HPSCB Recruitment 2026 offers 91 new vacancies for Junior Clerk posts. Eligible candidates with any Graduate can apply online from 09-05-2026 to 29-05-2026 through the official HPSCB website, hpscb.bank.in
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk (quota for PACS/OCS of HP)

salary_details.pay_scale: Minimum Pay of Rs. 19,900/- (Level-2) + admissible allowances per month (Regular Basis)

selection_process: Online Examination (150 marks, 150 minutes) + Document Verification/Scrutiny (No Personal Interview)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Bank's website www.hpscb.bank.in by clicking the "APPLY ONLINE" option. Hard copy applications or applications by any other mode will not be accepted. The online application window is open from 09-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Candidates must register on the portal, make fee payment online, and upload all required documents. No change will be possible after clicking the "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" button. Candidates are advised to keep their valid personal email ID and mobile number active till the completion of the entire recruitment process.
seo_tags: HP State Cooperative Bank Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority (HPSLSA) Recruitment 2026 for 11 posts of Driver-cum-Office Assistant. Candidates with Graduate Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 14-05-2026, and closes on 13-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through HPSLSA official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate from a recognized University. Must possess a valid Driving Licence for Light Motor Vehicles (LMV) and have a minimum driving experience of three (3) years. Preference to candidates with good mechanical knowledge of automobiles.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the HPSLSA Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Himachal Pradesh State Legal Services Authority Driver-cum-Office Assistant Recruitment 2026

basic_details.job_title: IIT Mandi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chief Executive Officer/ Chief Operating Officer
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Mandi (IIT Mandi) has recruits 1 Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Post. Candidates with Bachelor’s degree in Science/Engineering and relevant leadership experience can apply through email. The application process closes on 01-07-2026. Candidates should apply through the IIT Mandi website, iitmandi.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, and/or technical background is mandatory; Master's/Ph.D./MBA is preferred. Minimum 15 years of progressive industry/corporate experience with at least 5 years in a senior leadership/managerial role.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Mandi Chief Executive Officer (CEO)/Chief Operating Officer (COO) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.

basic_details.job_title: HPSCDRC Senior Scale Stenographer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (HPSCDRC) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C). Candidates with Bachelor's Degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 22-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through HPSCDRC official website hpconsumercommission.hp.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree or its equivalent from a University recognized by the Government of Himachal Pradesh., English Shorthand speed: 100 words per minute (W.P.M.), English Typing Speed: 40 words per minute (W.P.M.), Adequate knowledge of word processing on computer.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://hpconsumercommission.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.
seo_tags: H.P. State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission Senior Scale Stenographer (Group-C) Recruitment 2026
